title: Harden PR task binding guard v2
goal: Require open working PRs to bind exactly one valid Bureau task unless an explicit schema-visible exception exists.

acceptance.assertion: An open working PR without a valid task id is merge-blocking.
An open working PR with multiple task ids is merge-blocking unless an explicit exception is recorded.
The bound task must exist, belong to the expected repository claim and not be terminal without follow-up semantics.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T003 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is PR task binding guard v2.

verified_acceptance.no-task-pr-blocker: PR #296 makes the claim guard classify unbound open PRs as binding=missing with task_id=missing and an explicit task binding violation; PR #297 makes github-observe report missing-github-task-binding with binding_healthy=false.
verified_acceptance.multi-task-pr-blocker: PR #296 changes multi-task PRs from per-task implemented claims to binding=multiple violations unless an explicit exception exists; PR #297 reports ambiguous GitHub bindings as hard findings unless a schema-visible exception is present.
verified_acceptance.task-existence-repo-check: PR #297 adds observer hard findings for invalid task IDs, wrong repository resource claims using resource overlap, and terminal task bindings without follow-up semantics; PR #296 blocks terminal task bindings in the claim guard path.

validation: PR #296 CI validate succeeded for Python 3.10 and 3.12 before merge; local validation reported 396 passed.
PR #297 CI validate succeeded for Python 3.10 and 3.12 before merge; local validation after review fixes reported 403 passed.
